resources.name: CCV API - By Roles (Full)
resources.description: Single collection with one folder per role and all allowed requests per role based on routes, gates and policies.
Endpoints without authentication.
resources.name: 00. PUBLIC

resources.description: Gate::before grants full access to all authenticated endpoints.
resources.name: 01. SUPER_ADMIN (acc=1000)

resources.description: All management modules except cuotas (manage-cuotas denied for ADMIN).
resources.name: 02. ADMIN (acc=991-999)

resources.description: Debt, solvencia global, socios manage, halls view, invitados manage.
resources.name: 03. OPERATOR (acc=961-990)

resources.description: Debt, solvencia global, halls view, invitados manage.
resources.name: 04. SUPERVISOR (acc=931-960)

resources.description: Only authenticated user endpoints and halls read-only.
resources.name: 05. ALLY (acc=901-930)

resources.description: Own partner view, halls reserve own, invitados own; no debt gate.
resources.name: 06. HONORARY (acc=801-900)
Partners - Show
resources.description: Policy ownership: user acc must match partner acc.
Policy ownership: user acc must match reservation acc for update/delete.
